_comment: Anthropic Claude models via the Anthropic API. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env to a regular API key (sk-ant-api*) or a Claude Code OAuth token (sk-ant-oat*, generated via `claude setup-token` — requires Claude Pro/Max subscription). OAuth tokens are auto-detected and sent via Bearer auth with the required anthropic-beta header.

anthropic-claude-haiku-4-5.comment: Haiku 4.5 — fastest and cheapest. Good for most PlanExe runs. $1.00/M input tokens. $5.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-haiku-4-5-pinned.comment: Haiku 4.5 — pinned to a specific version for reproducibility. $1.00/M input tokens. $5.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-6.comment: Sonnet 4.6 (latest) — higher quality than Haiku, about 10x more expensive. Good balance of quality and cost for complex plans. $3.00/M input tokens. $15.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-5.comment: Sonnet 4.5 — previous generation, pinned. $3.00/M input tokens. $15.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-6-thinking.comment: Sonnet 4.6 with extended thinking enabled (budget_tokens: 10000). Produces higher-quality structured output for complex tasks but significantly increases latency and cost. PlanExe makes 60-100+ calls per plan — use sparingly. $3.00/M input tokens. $15.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-opus-4-6.comment: Opus 4.6 (latest, most capable) — highest quality, highest cost. Best for plans where quality matters more than budget. PlanExe makes 60-100+ calls — expect significant spend per plan. $5.00/M input tokens. $25.00/M output tokens.

anthropic-claude-opus-4-6-thinking.comment: Opus 4.6 with extended thinking (budget_tokens: 16000). Maximum quality — use only when cost is not a concern. High latency per call. $5.00/M input tokens. $25.00/M output tokens.
